name: mublo-editor
description: Lightweight WYSIWYG editor with zero dependencies. Built-in i18n, image upload, autosave, and plugin system.

scripts.build: esbuild src/MubloEditor.js --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/mublo-editor.esm.js && esbuild src/MubloEditor.js --bundle --format=iife --global-name=MubloEditor --outfile=dist/mublo-editor.umd.js && esbuild src/MubloEditor.js --bundle --minify --format=iife --global-name=MubloEditor --outfile=dist/mublo-editor.min.js && cp src/MubloEditor.css dist/mublo-editor.css && esbuild src/MubloEditor.css --minify --outfile=dist/mublo-editor.min.css

author: Mublo
